name: KartMania Silver
short_description: Invite your friends to have fun with you playing KartMania! A Kart game where you race around the tracks in the universe of Silver Games games, use and abuse special items to get ahead of your friends and thus win first place! Speed ​​to glory in KartMania Silver!
detailed_description:
Speed ​​your way to glory in KartMania Silver!

Get ready for a thrilling, adrenaline-pumping kart racing experience that will test your skills to the max. Master tight turns, avoid obstacles and use strategic power-ups to overcome your opponents and cross the finish line first.

Race on tracks inspired by the Silver Games gaming universe and challenge your friends to show who is the best driver!

In KartMania Silver


  • Intense Multiplayer: Challenge your friends in exciting kart races and show who is the true master of the tracks. Play with up to 4 people and have fun together.
  • Strategic Items: Use a variety of unique power-ups to gain an advantage during the race, from turbo boosts to traps for your opponents.
  • Various Characters and Karts: There are several characters and several Karts for you to choose the ones that will take you to the top of the podium more easily!
